errors.fileTooLarge: File must not be larger than 10mb
errors.onlyPdf: Only PDF files can be uploaded

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.p1: If you typed the web address, check it is correct.
notFound.p2: If you pasted the web address, check you copied the entire address.

internalServerError.title: Sorry, there is a problem with the service

uploadEvidenceIndividually.title: Upload evidence individually
uploadEvidenceIndividually.examples: Examples of evidence include: a single court order, a bundle of court orders, court attendance notes.

reusingDocuments.p: You can upload a document once and apply it to multiple work items.

namingFiles.p1: Files often have long, meaningless names, but if you rename them to an understandable name it will make it easier for us to assess your case.
namingFiles.p2: For example, interim-hearing-court-order.pdf instead of file23.pdf.

fileUploadForLineItem.p1: You can upload evidence that applies to:
fileUploadForLineItem.ul1: several line items, and reuse it for other line items later

examplesOfEvidence.title: Examples of evidence
examplesOfEvidence.courtOrders: A single court order, or a bundle of court orders
examplesOfEvidence.invoices: A single disbursement invoice, or a bundle of invoices

clientStatus.title: What is your client’s party status?

submissionSuccessful.title: Payment on account submitted
submissionSuccessful.p1: We are processing this POA and you will receive a decision shortly.
